name: Metrics Indoor Golf
about: Metrics Indoor Golf is a premier destination for indoor golfing experiences, featuring state-of-the-art technology and a full-service bar and lounge area. The facility is equipped with Trackman 4 simulator bays that provide access to over 280 courses and 50+ tour venues, along with comprehensive swing data analysis. Located in the North Raleigh area, it caters to golfers seeking practice, play, and professional instruction in a modern, accessible environment. With a focus on both casual players and serious golfers, Metrics offers memberships, lessons, club fittings, and leagues to accommodate various skill levels and needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 technology with 40+ data metrics per shot
Full-service bar and lounge with sports entertainment
Professional instruction by Dan Alton with 20,000+ lessons experience
Club fittings using advanced launch monitor data
20x8ft putting green with laser training technology
Member leagues and events for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, wine, and seltzers from local breweries and domestic labels available

simulator_hardware.notes: Optically Enhanced Radar Technology (OERT) combines radar and dual camera optics

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: The facility offers a full bar with beer, wine, and seltzers from local and domestic brands. Outside food and drink is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but standard indoor golf sessions typically last 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly policies or amenities is provided.
